mapper.select: SELECT id, book_id, quantity, card_no, discount, amount, date, remark FROM sale_record WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, book_id, quantity, card_no, discount, amount, date, remark FROM sale_record ORDER BY date DESC
SELECT id, book_id, quantity, card_no, discount, amount, date, remark FROM sale_record WHERE date = #{date} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, book_id, quantity, card_no, discount, amount, date, remark FROM sale_record WHERE date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY date DESC
SELECT id, book_id, quantity, card_no, discount, amount, date, remark FROM sale_record WHERE card_no = #{cardNo} ORDER BY date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sale_record (book_id, quantity, card_no, discount, amount, date, remark) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{quantity}, #{cardNo}, #{discount}, #{amount}, #{date}, #{remark})
